trial_details.trajectory:
Understood, let's fix the problematic Kubernetes pod.The pod is in the "ErrImageNeverPull" status, meaning the image for the container cannot be pulled.The output shows that the pod is failing to pull the image "misspeling-app:latset" due to a spelling mistake in the image name. The container is in the "Waiting" state with the "ErrImageNeverPull" reason.I have fixed the issue by patching the deployment to use the correct image name "misspelling-app:latest" instead of "misspeling-app:latset".

FIX COMPLETE

## COMMANDS EXECUTED:
1. $ kubectl get pod misspelling-deployment-6579ff5454-9lhrd -n case6-test
   Output: NAME                                      READY   STATUS              RESTARTS   AGE
misspelling-deployment-6579ff5454-9lhrd   0/1     ErrImageNeverPull   0          14s...
2. $ kubectl describe pod misspelling-deployment-6579ff5454-9lhrd -n case6-test
   Output: Name:             misspelling-deployment-6579ff5454-9lhrd
Namespace:        case6-test
Priority:         0
Service Account:  default
Node:             minikube/192.168.49.2
Start Time:       Thu, 25 D...
3. $ kubectl patch deployment misspelling-deployment -n case6-test --type=json -p='[{"op":"replace","path":"/spec/template/spec/containers/0/image","value":"misspelling-app:latest"}]'
   Output: deployment.apps/misspelling-deployment patched...
